auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Push by Techulus account or team API key sent with the x-api-key header. Find account keys on the console integrations page at https://push.techulus.com/console/integrations; team keys are shown in the team details screen.

actions.name: send_group_notification
actions.description: Send a Push by Techulus notification to a specific device group.

groupId.description: The Push by Techulus device group ID used in the request path.

title.description: The notification title shown on recipient devices.

body.description: The notification body text shown on recipient devices.

sound.description: The notification sound name documented by Push by Techulus.

channel.description: The alphanumeric notification channel identifier. Hyphens are allowed, and Push by Techulus defaults it to feed.

link.description: The URL to open when the recipient taps the notification.

image.description: The image URL to show with the notification.

timeSensitive.description: Whether iOS should deliver the notification immediately even in Do Not Disturb mode.

inputSchema.description: The Push by Techulus notification to send to a device group.

success.description: Whether Push by Techulus accepted the notification request.

message.description: The response message returned by Push by Techulus.

success.description: Whether this individual device notification succeeded.

message.description: The message returned for this individual device notification.

items.description: A per-device notification response returned by Push by Techulus.

responses.description: Per-device responses returned by Push by Techulus when available.

outputSchema.description: The Push by Techulus response for a notification request.

actions.name: send_notification
actions.description: Send a Push by Techulus notification to all devices targeted by the account or team API key.

title.description: The notification title shown on recipient devices.

body.description: The notification body text shown on recipient devices.

sound.description: The notification sound name documented by Push by Techulus.

channel.description: The alphanumeric notification channel identifier. Hyphens are allowed, and Push by Techulus defaults it to feed.

link.description: The URL to open when the recipient taps the notification.

image.description: The image URL to show with the notification.

timeSensitive.description: Whether iOS should deliver the notification immediately even in Do Not Disturb mode.

inputSchema.description: The Push by Techulus notification to send to all devices targeted by the API key.

success.description: Whether Push by Techulus accepted the notification request.

message.description: The response message returned by Push by Techulus.

success.description: Whether this individual device notification succeeded.

message.description: The message returned for this individual device notification.

items.description: A per-device notification response returned by Push by Techulus.

responses.description: Per-device responses returned by Push by Techulus when available.

outputSchema.description: The Push by Techulus response for a notification request.
